div1.entryFree:
Unsought, 1) not sought, not searched for: unknown to you, u. Cymb. V, 5, 451.
2) not pursued, not solicited: love sought is good, but given u. is better, Tw. III, 1, 168.
3) not searched (?): loath to leave u. or that or any place that harbours men, Err. I, 1, 136. cf. H6A V, 4, 3.
